description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named p4c-dpdk-ptf-tests that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels any in-progress runs when a new run is triggered. Set up an ubuntu-22.04 job with various environment variables for infrap4d and dpdk libs. The job should use ccache, check out multiple repositories (p4-dpdk-target, ipdk-recipe, and P4C), install DPDK dependencies, compile p4sde dpdk target, build infrap4d dependencies and infrap4d, build p4c with only the DPDK backend, and finally run DPDK PTF tests.
